dependencies: Single source dependencies for certain raw or intermediate materials
Dependence on China-based suppliers for portions of supply chain including integral chemical synthesis, reagents, starting materials, and ingredients
Regional or single source dependencies may accentuate risks related to manufacturing and supply
risks: Manufacturing or quality assurance difficulties at facilities or those of contractors and suppliers
Failure or refusal of supplier or contract manufacturer to supply contracted quantities
Increases in demand on a supplier with constrained capacity
Natural disasters, public health outbreaks, epidemics, or pandemics
Equipment, mechanical, data, or IT system vulnerabilities
Challenges and complexities in manufacturing new drug modalities
Contractual disputes with suppliers and contract manufacturers
Vertical integration by competitors within supply chain
Inability to obtain single-source or other raw or intermediate materials
Availability of adequate capacity in global transportation

regulatory_risks: FDA regulatory oversight and approval processes
EMA regulatory requirements in Europe
Ministry of Health, Labor and Welfare requirements in Japan
National Medical Products Administration requirements in China
Current Good Manufacturing Practices (cGMP) compliance
Quality assurance regulations
Product recalls and seizures
Import bans or denials of import certifications
Delays or denials in new product approvals
Federal anti-kickback statute compliance
False Claims Act compliance
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) compliance
Data privacy and security laws (EU, UK, China, US)
International data transfer restrictions
Environmental, health and safety regulations
Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) - government-set prices for Medicare drugs
Medicare Part D benefit redesign
340B Drug Pricing Program requirements
Medicaid Drug Rebate Program requirements
State drug affordability boards with power to set upper payment limits
State transparency initiatives and reporting requirements
Pharmacy benefit manager reform proposals
BIOSECURE Act (proposed legislation affecting pharmaceutical supply chain)
EU General Pharmaceutical Legislation (proposed reductions in data protection periods)
Climate change and sustainability disclosure requirements
Counterfeit, misbranded, adulterated, and compounded drug regulations
Patent and intellectual property protection changes
March-in-rights proposals
IPR (inter partes review) process challenges to patents
Pillar Two global minimum tax legislation
Trade restrictions and tariffs (US-China, other jurisdictions)
Healthcare cost containment measures globally
Reference pricing and price controls in international markets
Health technology assessment processes
Comparative effectiveness requirements

sanction_risks: Potential additional trade restrictions between US and China
February 2025 new US tariffs on China and retaliatory Chinese tariffs
Proposed tariffs with Mexico, Canada and Europe
International tension and conflicts affecting operations
Geopolitical tensions disrupting operations in or related to China
